name: twitch-subscriptions
description: Manage the subscriptions for your server.
addDescription: Add a new Twitch subscription for a streamer.
removeDescription: Remove a Twitch subscription for a streamer.
resetDescription: Remove all Twitch subscriptions from this server.
showDescription: Show all Twitch subscriptions for this server.
optionsStreamerDescription: The Twitch streamer to subscribe to.
optionsChannelDescription: The Discord channel to post notifications in.
optionsTypeDescription: Whether to notify when the streamer goes live or offline.
optionsMessageDescription: Custom message to include in the notification.
streamerNotFound: {{REDCROSS}} Sorry, I could not find the streamer. Are you sure you wrote their name correctly?
invalidStatus: {{REDCROSS}} Woah there! I expected "online" or "offline", but I cannot understand what you gave me instead.
addDuplicated: {{REDCROSS}} You're already subscribed to that streamer in this channel for that status.
addSuccessOffline: {{GREENTICK}} Success! Whenever {{name}} goes offline, I will post a new message in {{channel}}.
addSuccessLive: {{GREENTICK}} Success! Whenever {{name}} goes live, I will post a new message in {{channel}}.
addMessageForOfflineRequired: {{REDCROSS}} I'm sorry but it is required to provide a message when making an offline subscription.
noSubscriptions: {{REDCROSS}} I'm sorry but you are not subscribed to any streamers, mission abort!
removeStreamerNotSubscribed: {{REDCROSS}} I'm sorry, you cannot unsubscribe from {{streamer}} because you are not subscribed to them.
removeNotToProvidedChannel: {{REDCROSS}} I'm sorry; while you're subscribed to this streamer and streaming status, their subscription is not posted to {{channel}}.
removeStreamerStatusNotMatch: {{REDCROSS}} I'm sorry, but it looks like you're not getting {{status}} notifications for {{streamer}}. We support "online" and "offline" notifications.
removeSuccessOffline: {{GREENTICK}} Success! I will no longer post messages to {{channel}} whenever {{name}} goes offline.
removeSuccessLive: {{GREENTICK}} Success! I will no longer post messages to {{channel}} whenever {{name}} goes live.
resetSuccess_one: {{GREENTICK}} Success! {{count}} subscription has been removed from this server.
resetSuccess_other: {{GREENTICK}} Success! {{count}} subscriptions have been removed from this server.
showStreamerNotSubscribed: {{REDCROSS}} You wanted to see all subscriptions from this streamer, but there are none!
